name: cypress-json-html-reporter
description: A Cypress Mocha reporter that generates timestamped JSON test results and converts them into rich, interactive HTML reports with dashboards, error summaries, and execution history.
author: Praveen Jayaprasad

scripts.build:cjs: shx rm -rf dist/cjs && shx mkdir -p dist/cjs && shx cp index.js dist/cjs/index.js && shx cp plugin.js dist/cjs/plugin.js && shx cp support.js dist/cjs/support.js && shx cp -R lib dist/cjs/lib
scripts.build:esm: shx rm -rf dist/esm && shx mkdir -p dist/esm && babel index.js --out-file dist/esm/index.js --env-name esm && babel plugin.js --out-file dist/esm/plugin.js --env-name esm && babel support.js --out-file dist/esm/support.js --env-name esm && babel lib --out-dir dist/esm/lib --extensions ".js" --env-name esm && node scripts/fix-esm-exports.js
scripts.build: npm run build:cjs && npm run build:esm
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:cypress && npm run test:report
